main.description: Verify the attestations on a record. Resolves the record at `uri`, recomputes the canonical attestation CID, and checks each entry in its signatures array: inline network.attested.signature entries are verified by ECDSA against `key`; remote strongRefs are resolved to network.attested.proof records whose `cid` must match the subject's canonical CID. Any network.attested.* speaker can call this to verify without re-deriving the CID machinery.

uri.description: AT-URI of the record to verify.

cid.description: The canonical attestation CID computed for the resolved record.

valid.description: True if at least one attestation verified against the resolved record.

signatures.description: The verified signature entries (inline and/or remote strongRefs).

workflow.description: Optional workflow identifier the caller can use to require a specific set of attestation roles.
